description: A candid, undesigned photograph (no on-image text) of the Lincoln Memorial in Washington, D.C., shot from across the National Mall's Reflecting Pool at golden hour. The white marble Lincoln Memorial with its colonnade is centered in the background under a blue sky with scattered clouds; its image is mirrored in a large reflective puddle/wet surface in the drained or partly drained reflecting pool in the foreground. At right edge is the side of a large grey enclosed cargo trailer (apparently a contractor's pressure-washing/restoration trailer parked on the Mall). Black tarps and orange traffic barriers line the edge of the pool. This is a photograph of restoration work at the memorial. The tweet itself carried only a link.
